phrases.intent_en: Ask where water taxi to Göcek departs
phrases.cultural_note: Water taxi departure points are informal and may shift; a marina görevlisi or tour guide can direct you to the current spot.

likely_response.translation_en: From the dock at the marina entrance.

responses.english: From the dock at the marina entrance.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which booth has boat to Butterfly Valley
phrases.text_local: Kelebekler Vadisi teknesi hangi gişeden kalkıyor?
phrases.cultural_note: Turkish boat tour operators often cluster informally along harbor promenades rather than at fixed numbered booths.

likely_response.translation_en: The booth on the left of the harbor.

responses.english: The booth on the left of the harbor.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which booth has boat to Butterfly Valley
phrases.text_local: Kelebekler Vadisi'ne giden tekne hangi gişede?
phrases.cultural_note: Boat tour docks are scattered along the coast; there is no single booth for Butterfly Valley.

likely_response.translation_en: One of the booths at the second dock.

responses.english: One of the booths at the second dock.

phrases.intent_en: Ask dolmuş fare to Ölüdeniz from harbor
phrases.text_local: Limandan Ölüdeniz dolmuş ücreti ne kadar?
phrases.cultural_note: Dolmuş fares are subject to periodic municipal adjustments and are best confirmed at the stop or with the driver.
